_comment: Copy to watchlist.json (git-ignored) and edit with YOUR positions. For a MULTI-USER roster, save as watchlist.<id>.json (also git-ignored) and set 'owner'/'recipient'/'lang'. Fields per position: ticker (symbol, or A/HK numeric code), market US|A|HK (routes the quote source — US=Yahoo via `ot quote`, A & HK=Eastmoney via `ot cn`), shares (OPTIONAL — omit if unknown and use 'tier' instead), tier core|secondary|watch (conviction when shares are unknown: 重仓/次持仓/关注), driver/note (context). 'cash' = dry powder the desk can deploy into adds / NEW positions. Unknown US tickers still match news literally; add aliases in tools/financialjuice/fj.py.
